details: The "Saksham Jharkhand Kaushal Vikas Yojana" is a component of the umbrella scheme “Mukhymantri Sarthi Yojana” launched by the Department of Labour, Employment, Training and Skill Development, Jharkhand. The scheme aims to create job opportunities for 70% of successful trainees through placement-linked and self-employment training across various sectors. The program operates through 72 training centers and covers trades.
benefits: Payment terms and schedule are guided by the Common Norms notified by the Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship (MSDE).
For residential training or trainees who need to travel significant distances
X Category Cities: ₹375/- per day per trainee.
Y Category Cities: ₹315/- per day per trainee.
Z Category Cities: ₹250/- per day per trainee.
Rural Areas or Non-Municipal Areas: ₹220/- per day per trainee.

Training in industry-relevant sectors like Tourism & Hospitality, Telecom, Security, Retail, Plumbing, Logistics, IT/ITES, Electronics, Domestic Worker, Construction, Capital Goods, BFSI, Beauty & Wellness, Automotive, Apparel, and Agriculture, Food Processing, Healthcare, Iron & Steel, Mining
eligibility: The applicant must be a resident of Jharkhand.
The applicant's age should be 18-35 years.
The applicant must belong to one of the priority groups (SC/ST, women, PwD, transgender).

online: for registration under the "Mukhymantri Sarthi Yojana" umbrella scheme.
Candidate registration would be Aadhaar-based & hence Aadhaar number at the time of candidate registration would be mandatory.

faqs.question: What is the main objective of SJKVY?
faqs.answer: To provide quality skills training to Jharkhand youth and ensure employment opportunities.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Residents of Jharkhand aged 18-35 years with an interest in the offered trades.

faqs.question: What sectors are covered under SJKVY?
faqs.answer: IT, healthcare, construction, beauty & wellness, agriculture, logistics, and more.

faqs.question: How can I apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Register on the official portal (https://jsdm.jharkhand.gov.in/jsdm/cms/en/) and submit the required documents.

faqs.question: What is the duration of the courses?
faqs.answer: Course duration depends on the trade and is compliant with NSQF standards.

faqs.question: How many training centers are operational?
What is the infrastructure requirement for training centers?
faqs.answer: 10,000 sq. ft. in Ranchi, Dhanbad, Jamshedpur, Hazaribagh, and Bokaro; 5,000 sq. ft. in other districts.

faqs.question: What is NSQF?
faqs.answer: National Skills Qualification Framework ensures standardized and industry-relevant training.

faqs.question: Are there placement opportunities?
faqs.answer: Yes, the scheme aims to place 70% of successful trainees.

faqs.question: Is self-employment supported under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Yes, training includes support for self-employment and entrepreneurship.

faqs.question: What is the role of Sector Skill Councils (SSC)?
faqs.answer: SSCs ensure industry alignment and certification of courses.
